description.en-US: Milesight VS133 — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors button presses, distance / level and people counts. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85.
description.pt-BR: Milesight VS133 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora acionamentos de botão, distância / nível e contagem de pessoas. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85.
